warning1: A very small number of people may experience photosensitive seizures when viewing flashing videos or images that they have never experienced before.
warning3: If you or a family member have ever experienced such symptoms, please consult a doctor before playing.
warning4: The use of cheats in the game is strictly prohibited, regardless of type.
warning5: The management team always monitors players' play records, and users found to have used cheats will be permanently banned.
warning6: Songs, images, and some elements included in URLATE are not owned by Coupy, and distributing them may lead to legal consequences.
tutorial_information_1: Hello, it looks like you're new to URLATE!
tutorial_information_2: We recommend going through the tutorial to understand URLATE and learn how to enjoy it more.
offset_sub_description_1: You can also adjust it directly with the buttons on the right.
sound_volume_tip: You can quickly adjust the volume in-game using Shift + Scroll.
info_title3: What kind of game is URLATE?
info5: URLATE is a open-source rhythm game built with web technologies.
info6: You must move the cursor to dodge bullets flying from all directions while hitting notes at the precise timing.
info7: A rhythm game project that started under the name MyRhy in 2017 has evolved into its current form after many versions of experimentation.
info1: URLATE is a game developed since 2018, with its first demo released in 2020, and crowdfunded through Tumblbug.
info2: After funding, two rounds of CBT incorporated user feedback, and the game officially launched on November 11, 2021.
info2+: Afterwards, efforts were made to improve the business model, refine operations, and strengthen the team, but due to various difficulties, the sustainability of the game could not be secured. As a result, the service was ultimately shut down in January 2022.
info3: URLATE LITE is a project to develop and distribute an open-source game based on the shut-down game URLATE.
info4: All monetization elements from the original URLATE — such as the store and memberships — have been removed, leaving only the gameplay and editor features.
info_title4: Where can I find the source code for URLATE?
info8: You can view the original source code at the links above. For information on usage and modification, please refer to the README in the repository.
info_title5: How can I follow URLATE news?
info9: Updates on the game's development and behind-the-scenes can be found on Coupy's
info14: URLATE LITE plans to continuously improve its shortcomings through regular updates.
info15: URLATE NEXT is currently in planning, which will re-optimize the URLATE client and add new features.
info16: Contributions via browser extensions for new features or PRs/Issues through the GitHub repository are always welcome — your interest is appreciated!
